title: Podcast Publisher Engine
summary: Turns a topic prompt or voice note into a recorded, packaged, and distributed podcast episode.
businessOutcome: Launch episodes faster without touching editing, upload, or distribution by hand.
thumbnail: Prompt in. Episode out. Published everywhere.
problem: Publishing a single episode usually means bouncing between scripting, voice, graphics, metadata, and podcast hosts.
solution: This system coordinates ideation, script creation, voice production, artwork packaging, and publishing so one input becomes a release-ready episode.
workflowOverview: Captures a topic or voice prompt and generates the episode brief
Creates narration script and asset checklist through Claude
Packages distribution assets and posts to the publishing stack

access.headline: Get instant access to the Podcast Publisher Engine
access.subheadline: Start from a working podcast automation project instead of building your publishing flow from zero. This package is designed for creators and teams that want speed without losing structure.
includes: Setup notes for adapting assets and destinations
access.guarantee: One-time access to the project package, guided setup assets, and a structure you can adapt for your own publishing pipeline.
access.supportNote: If your publishing flow needs custom channels, brand logic, or a connected content stack, this project can be adapted into a custom build.

upsells.title: Add the Content Ops Kickstart Pack
upsells.summary: Get extra prompt scaffolds, content naming rules, and rollout notes so your team can operate the workflow more consistently.
